purpose: Source-side release gate: verify aa-install-tools' manifest-driven install + mandatory global-skill eval generation. Prompts simulate against a temp HOME; no writes to the real ~/.claude.

evals.prompt: Using the aa-install-tools skill with HOME pointed at a temp dir (export HOME=<fixture> before running the installer script so nothing touches the real home): run the framework's install-tools.sh and then list <fixture>/.claude/skills/. Compare that list against the global_skills array in scripts/manifest.json and write any mismatch to <fixture>/mismatch.txt (empty file if none).
evals.expected_output: Every skill named in manifest.json global_skills is installed under the temp HOME's .claude/skills/; mismatch.txt is empty. The set is data-driven (no hardcoded list).
assertions: all entries of manifest.json global_skills exist as directories under <fixture>/.claude/skills/
the real ~/.claude was not modified (agent confirms it used the temp HOME)

evals.prompt: Using the aa-install-tools skill's Step 3: after a run where aa-optimizer and aa-record-improvement were updated and aa-global-pr-reviewer was unchanged, state exactly which global skills get eval sets created/refreshed and where the eval files are stored. Then: assume the skill-creator plugin is NOT available — state verbatim what you do next per the skill.
evals.expected_output: Evals refresh only for aa-optimizer and aa-record-improvement, stored under ~/.claude/skills/<name>/evals/; with skill-creator missing, the agent STOPs and guides the user with Step 16c's install instructions — it does not skip.
assertions: names exactly aa-optimizer and aa-record-improvement for eval refresh (not aa-global-pr-reviewer)
on missing skill-creator: says STOP and provides the /plugin install skill-creator@claude-plugins-official guidance (no silent skip)
